name: My Financing USA
description_short: My Financing USA specializes in RV and boat loans for all credit types, matching borrowers with nationwide lenders offering terms up to 20 years and rates from 5.99%-19.95%.
description_long:
My Financing USA has been in the RV and boat financing business for 22 years, processing $16.2 billion in applications and serving approximately 390,000 customers. The company operates as a loan matching service rather than a direct lender, connecting borrowers with nationwide RV and boat loan programs tailored to individual circumstances. They are accredited members of the RV Industry Association (RVIA), RV Dealer Association (RVDA), and National Marine Lenders Association (NMLA), and maintain a 5-star rating on Trustpilot.

The company offers secured loans specifically designed for RV and boat purchases, with loan amounts starting at $10,000 minimum and terms extending up to 20 years. Interest rates range from 5.99% to 19.95%, and they accept applicants with credit scores as low as 550. Their loan programs accommodate various credit situations including past bankruptcies, collections accounts, late payments, and borrowers with co-signers. They also offer specialized financing for full-time RV living when the RV serves as a primary residence, and accept both private party and dealer purchases.

My Financing USA distinguishes itself through a pre-qualification process designed to reduce excessive credit inquiries by only matching applicants with lenders meeting their specific needs. Their online application process takes approximately 5 minutes and can be completed on a smartphone. The company claims funding can occur within as little as 48 hours, with borrowers potentially receiving a check in hand for their purchase. They emphasize credit protection and claim to find better rates than borrowers would receive working directly with dealers.

While the company has legitimate industry credentials and a substantial customer base, potential borrowers should note that the interest rate range of 5.99%-19.95% is quite broad, meaning actual rates depend heavily on credit profile. The $10,000 minimum loan amount excludes smaller purchases, and their exclusions (no park models or schoolies) limit applicability for certain RV types. As a loan broker rather than direct lender, transparency about specific lender partners and actual approval rates would strengthen consumer confidence.
pros: Works with credit scores as low as 550 and accepts past bankruptcies, collections, and late payments
Specialized RV and boat loan programs with terms up to 20 years, longer than typical personal loans
Pre-qualification process designed to minimize credit inquiries by matching only with suitable lenders
Online application completable in 5 minutes from smartphone with potential 48-hour funding
Accredited by RVIA, RVDA, and NMLA with 5-star Trustpilot rating
Offers specialized financing for full-time RV living as primary residence
Accepts private party and dealer purchases, plus co-signers, LLCs, and trusts
cons: Interest rates range from 5.99%-19.95% — a very wide spread indicating highly variable actual rates
$10,000 minimum loan amount eliminates smaller boat/RV purchases
Excludes certain RV types (park models and schoolies) from financing
Website does not disclose specific lender partners or actual approval rates
As a loan broker, actual terms and rates depend on lenders' final decisions, not guaranteed upfront
best_for: Borrowers with credit scores below 620 seeking RV or boat financing who face rejection from traditional lenders
Full-time RV owners needing financing where the vehicle serves as primary residence
Buyers wanting specialized loan terms up to 20 years rather than standard 5-7 year personal loans
Consumers concerned about credit inquiries who prefer pre-qualification before lender submission
diagnosis: My Financing USA is best for RV and boat buyers with poor to fair credit (550-620 score range) or credit blemishes who need specialized secured lending with extended terms. The main caveat is that advertised interest rates span 10 percentage points, actual rates depend entirely on lender partners' decisions, and the $10,000 minimum excludes smaller purchases.
services: RV loan matching and placement with nationwide lenders
Boat loan matching and placement with nationwide lenders
Financing for borrowers with past bankruptcies
Financing for borrowers with collections and late payments
Private party RV and boat purchase financing
Dealer RV and boat purchase financing
Same-day to 48-hour funding with check disbursement
